sections.paragraph: prop. i.q. דָּאַד to melt, Greek τήκω. It is applied to terror and fear (comp. מוּנ, מָסַס), to fear, to be afraid, Jer 17:8 followed by an acc. 38:19 Isa 57:11 מִן Jer 42:16 also לְ of the person for whom we fear, 1Sa 9:5 10:2 and מִן of the thing, on account of which one is afraid, Psa 38:19. Hence the following words-
